title: CD-BAN: Cyclodextrin Bilinear Attention Network for Inclusion Complex Affinity Classification
description: A graph neural network (CD-BAN) that classifies drug-cyclodextrin inclusion complex binding affinity (Strong: K > 10,000 M⁻¹ vs. Weak: K < 100 M⁻¹) from SMILES strings alone, without 3D geometry or handcrafted descriptors. The model encodes a statistically significant monotonic affinity gradient across 1,850 withheld fuzzy-zone compounds (Kendall τ = -0.289, p < 10⁻⁷⁵), demonstrating continuous latent representation of binding strength. Includes pre-trained weights (10 seeds), large-scale coformer screening results (37,000 predictions), and attention heatmap visualization tools.
notes: Model trained on data from OpenCycloDB. Pre-trained weights for seeds 42-51 included. All results reproducible with provided scripts.
